_templateName: Generate Lead Magnet Ideas from Google Sheets using RapidAPI AI
_templateDescription:
🧲 AI-Powered Lead Magnet Idea Generation from Topic List

This n8n workflow automatically generates lead magnet ideas based on topics and website URLs stored in a Google Sheet. It uses the Lead Magnet Idea Generator AI API to produce relevant, value-driven ideas that marketers can turn into checklists, guides, templates, and more.

🔧 What This Workflow Does

Monitors a Google Sheet for new or updated rows using a Drive trigger.
Reads all rows and identifies entries where:
   The Topic column is not empty
   The Content (idea) column is empty
Sends a request to the Lead Magnet Idea Generator AI API:
   Input: Topic + Website URL
   Output: AI-generated lead magnet idea
Writes the idea back to the same Google Sheet with a timestamp.
Repeats the process automatically every minute.

🌐 API Used

Name:** Lead Magnet Idea Generator AI
API Endpoint:** https://lead-magnet-idea-generator-ai.p.rapidapi.com/index.php
Method:** POST
Headers:**
  x-rapidapi-host: lead-magnet-idea-generator-ai.p.rapidapi.com
  x-rapidapi-key: YOUR_RAPIDAPI_KEY
Body Params:**
  topic
  website

✅ Benefits

| Feature                         | Value                                                           |
|----------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 🔄 Automated Flow               | No manual entry needed — runs every minute                       |
| 🧠 AI-Based Content Ideation    | Smart suggestions tailored to your topic and brand               |
| 📝 Google Sheets Integration    | Easy to manage, edit, and view input/output in one place         |
| 🕒 Timestamp Tracking           | Know exactly when each idea was generated                        |
| 🚫 No Duplicate Processing      | Only rows missing ideas are sent to the API                      |
| 💼 Scalable for Teams           | Plug-and-play for any team managing multiple content ideas        |

❌ Challenges This Solves

| Old Challenge                              | New Workflow Solution                                           |
|--------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------|
| Manual brainstorming of lead magnet ideas  | Fully automated idea generation via API                         |
| Missing or inconsistent content in sheets  | Only incomplete rows are updated with valid ideas               |
| Lack of traceability                       | Timestamp logs show when each idea was generated                |
| Wasting time on repetitive tasks           | Workflow handles idea generation while you focus on execution   |

📌 Requirements

✅ A valid RapidAPI key
✅ Google Sheets & Google Drive credentials set up in n8n
✅ Google Sheet structured with the following columns:

| Column Name     | Purpose                                                | Required |
|------------------|----------------------------------------------------------|----------|
| Topic          | Main subject for which the idea is generated            | ✅ Yes   |
| Website Url    | Optional URL to provide brand context for the API       | ❌ No    |
| Content        | Will be filled with the AI-generated lead magnet idea   | ✅ Yes   |
| Generated Date | Timestamp when the idea was created                     | ✅ Yes   |

🧩 Technologies Used

n8n** – Automation platform
Google Sheets** – For storing topics and generated ideas
Google Drive Trigger** – To initiate the workflow
Lead Magnet Idea Generator AI API** – For content generation
HTTP Request node** – To communicate with the API
If / Wait / Split In Batches nodes** – For conditional logic and throttling

🧠 Example Use Cases

Content marketing teams planning lead magnets for blog posts
Agencies creating assets for multiple clients
Email list-building strategists generating downloadable content ideas
Business owners who want quick suggestions without manual brainstorming

Create your free n8n account and set up the workflow in just a few minutes using the link below:

👉 Start Automating with n8n

Save time, stay consistent, and grow your LinkedIn presence effortlessly!
name: Lead Magnet Generation

parameters.content:
# 🚀 Lead Magnet Idea Generation Workflow

## 🧩 Purpose
Automatically generates **lead magnet content ideas** based on a Google Sheet containing topics and website URLs. It checks for rows where content is missing and fills it using an AI API.

---

## ✅ Problem Solved

| ❌ Problem                            | ✅ Solution                                                                 |
|--------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| Manual content idea generation       | Automatically generates using a Lead Magnet AI API                          |
| Missing content in sheet rows        | Detects missing "Content" and fills it intelligently                        |
| No record of when ideas were created | Appends current date/time on content creation                               |
| Repeated manual checks               | Uses Google Drive Trigger to monitor changes every minute                   |

---

## 🔄 Workflow Overview

```mermaid
graph TD
    A[Google Drive Trigger] --> B[Google Sheets1 (Read Data)]
    B --> C[Loop Over Items]
    C --> D{If: Topic not empty AND Content empty?}
    D -->|Yes| E[HTTP Request (Generate Content)]
    E --> F[Google Sheets2 (Write Data)]
    F --> G[Wait (10s)]
    G --> C
    D -->|No| C

### 📌 Node: Google Drive Trigger

- **Type:** Trigger (n8n-nodes-base.googleDriveTrigger)
- **Function:** Watches a specific Google Sheet file for changes.
- **Trigger Mode:** Every minute (`pollTimes`)
- **Why it's used:** To detect changes in the spreadsheet and initiate the automation workflow.
- **Authentication:** Google Service Account
- **Watched File:**

### 📌 Node: Google Sheets1

- **Type:** Google Sheets (Read)
- **Function:** Reads all data from the specified sheet.
- **Why it's used:** Fetches rows to process for lead magnet generation.
- **Sheet Name:** Sheet1 (gid=0)
- **Authentication:** Google Service Account

### 📌 Node: Loop Over Items

- **Type:** Split In Batches (n8n-nodes-base.splitInBatches)
- **Function:** Processes each row one at a time.
- **Why it's used:** Ensures efficient row-by-row processing to control API load.
- **Options:**
  - `reset: false`

### 📌 Node: If

- **Type:** Conditional Check
- **Function:** Filters rows where:
  - `Topic` is **not empty**
  - `Content` is **empty**
- **Why it's used:** To skip rows that already have generated content or are missing topics.
- **Condition Logic:**
  - `Topic` → `notEmpty`
  - `Content` → `empty`
- **Combinator:** `AND`

### 📌 Node: HTTP Request

- **Type:** HTTP Request (POST)
- **Function:** Sends topic and website to an external AI API to generate lead magnet ideas.
- **URL:** `https://lead-magnet-idea-generator-ai.p.rapidapi.com/index.php`
- **Headers:**
  - `x-rapidapi-host: lead-magnet-idea-generator-ai.p.rapidapi.com`
  - `x-rapidapi-key: <your-api-key>`
- **Body Content-Type:** `multipart/form-data`
- **Body Parameters:**
  - `topic`: `={{ $json.Topic }}`
  - `website`: `={{ $json['Website Url'] }}`
- **Why it's used:** Automates lead magnet idea generation via third-party API.

### 📌 Node: Google Sheets2

- **Type:** Google Sheets (Append or Update)
- **Function:** Updates the same row with generated content and timestamp.
- **Why it's used:** Writes the result back into the Google Sheet.
- **Columns Mapping:**
  - `Topic`: `={{ $('If').item.json.Topic }}`
  - `Website Url`: `={{ $('If').item.json['Website Url'] }}`
  - `Content`: `={{ $json.data }}`
  - `Generated Date`: `={{ new Date().toLocaleString() }}`
- **Matching Column:** Topic
- **Authentication:** Google Service Account

### 📌 Node: Wait

- **Type:** Wait Node
- **Function:** Pauses the workflow for 10 seconds after writing data.
- **Why it's used:** Prevents rapid API hits and allows smooth looping.
- **Wait Time:** 10 seconds
